✅ LONG LASTING: Built to last, these strong plastic storage boxes with lids are made from impact resistant polypropylene that is fully recyclable, which can meet your different needs, from storing fruits to preparing dishes.

✅ SPACE SAVING DESIGN: These meal prep containers especially designed to minimize space, they are stackable and easily fit into your refrigerator, freezer or cupboard which enables you to get the kitchen organized and frees up space in the pantry. It doesn't only save space but also makes your kitchen look more organized.
✅ MICROWAVE AND FREEZER SAFE: These plastic storage box used is 100% BPA free. The containers are microwave , dishwasher, and freezer safe. They can be used in temperatures up to 55 degrees Celsius

✅ USER FRIENDLY DESIGN: These food storage containers allow ease store and stacking in cabinets, refrigerators and freezers. With a spacious, transparent design, it helps find stored food faster and better organize food items. The containers can be reused and cater to multipurpose storage requirements.
✅ EASY TO CARRY: These rectangle food storage box are stackable, portable, reusable, and affordable way to prep healthy food or snacks for school, work, or on the go.
✅ EASY TO CLEAN & MAINTAIN: These are easy to wipe clean, making them a hassle-free storage solution. The durable plastic ensures that your storage bins stay looking new, even with frequent use.
